_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of supervised and unsupervised machine learning algorithms, including their mathematical foundations, hyperparameter behavior, and appropriate application conditions.
comments: DCWF ksa equal WIDAI AI domain. AI-K-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-K-002 (AI, cosine: 0.641), AI-A-001 (AI, cosine: 0.618).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.4/10 (raw 0.641). Shared vocabulary: [algorithms, knowledge, learning, machine]. DCWF-only terms [statistical] vs WIDAI-only terms [application, appropriate, behavior, conditions, foundations, hyperparameter] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.908 (P=0.952, R=0.869). P exceeds R by 0.083 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 18 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (100.0%). "Knowledge of statistical/machine learning algorithms." and "Knowledge of supervised and unsupervised machine learning algorithms, including" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.678 ≈ STS 0.641 (gap 0.037). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [algorithms, knowledge, learning, machine] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 27.8%. Shared tokens: [algorithms, knowledge, learning, machine]. DCWF-only: [statistical]. WIDAI-only: [application, appropriate, behavior, conditions, foundations, hyperparameter].
